author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Write a reboot-facing diversity taxonomy note that translates external diversity-preservation literature into a practical policy for BDC selection physics and speciation work.
research_question: Can BDC replace its older informal diversity reasoning with an explicit taxonomy that is useful for the rebooted selection-physics line?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after the semantic note is written so the reboot line already has explicit state reasoning.

tests_required: note includes reboot implications and non-import warnings
